title: TFC+ Automated Bellows
body:
**TFC+ Automated Bellows is a fork & port of TFC Automated Bellows (Classic) to TerraFirmaCraft+!**
-  Note: This mod depends on [TerraFirmaCraft (Classic)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrafirmacraft) which is currently not on Modrinth.

**What's new?**
- Automated Bellows now depends on TerraFirmaCraft+ rather than TerraFirmaCraft (Classic).
- Updated texture assets to better fit TFC+.

<iframe width="639" height="359" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VmyRkNea5to" title="TerraFirmaCraft+ Automatic Bellows + Pottery Kiln!" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## TFC Bellows was ported with permission from [Sladki](https://github.com/Sladki) as seen [here](https://github.com/Sladki/TFC-AutomatedBellows-Addon/issues/8#issuecomment-1521035037).
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/651/993/permission.png)
craft) which is currently not on Modrinth.
